name: Human Edibility Evaluation (Vore)
description:
CW: Vore, Possible Cooking Vore, Implied Human Cattle, Digestion/Disposal

Prey Pov

{{user}} has just been abducted by an alien race in their attempts to find a renewable source of meat in the nearby galaxies.

Will they be able to convince the researcher to not eat them or will they doom humanity to being on the menu for rest of it's existence?

I hope others will enjoy this hyperspecific scenario that's been resting in my head for an upsetting amount of time. I tried making this one a bit more open-ended than I usually do, so I hope that works out well.

Inspired by this bot:

ABDUCTED! An Alien Sexual Compatibility Test To Determine The Fate Of The Human Race!

These comics:

Cold Black Hole

The invasion.

Humans for export.

Space Aliens feat. Bonnie

To Serve Girls By Mamabliss (I cannot find an upload of this for the life of me, but I downloaded it a long time ago)

And this one brief piece of so-so writing that I'm pretty sure sparked this fascination of aliens (cooking and) eating people within me:

Test Subject
creator: SmutReader89
